description: A graphic in a portrait card format from the White House account. The dominant visual is a large desaturated grayscale booking-style photo of a young Black man with short hair and a short beard, looking at the camera against a plain gray background, filling the left two-thirds of the frame. Inset at upper right is a rounded-corner color photo of a smiling white woman wearing sunglasses, a gray fleece jacket marked 'FLETC' and a backpack, standing on a mountain overlook; a caption overlaid on that inset reads 'Innocent American & DHS Employee Lauren Bullis.' Across the bottom third, a bold white sans-serif headline (with the words 'Naturalized Under' inside a red box) reads: 'Immigrant Naturalized Under Biden Murders Three People, Includng DHS Employee' (the word 'Including' is spelled 'Includng'). Beneath the headline is the White House wordmark with its small engraved building icon: 'The WHITE HOUSE.' The accompanying tweet reads 'THIS IS OUR WHY.'
notable_text: Immigrant Naturalized Under Biden Murders Three People, Includng DHS Employee | Innocent American & DHS Employee Lauren Bullis | The WHITE HOUSE
